runtime.pipeline_command: RUN_ROOT="${RUN_ROOT}" && DETECTOR_DIR="${DETECTOR_DIR}" && TOKENS_FILE="${TOKENS_FILE}" && SIGNALS_CSV="$RUN_ROOT/pump_end_signals_prod.csv" && WORKERS="${WORKERS:-8}" && TRAIN_END="2026-02-20" && OOS_END="2026-03-14 23:59:59" && mkdir -p "$RUN_ROOT" && TOKENS_CSV=$(sed 's/USDT$//i' "$TOKENS_FILE" | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//') && python -u -m pump_end_prod.pump_end_export_main --token "$TOKENS_CSV" --ch-dsn "${CH_DB}" --model-dir "$DETECTOR_DIR" --from "2025-01-01 00:00:00" --to "$OOS_END" --out "$SIGNALS_CSV" --workers "$WORKERS" && python -u -m pump_end_threshold.cli.build_regime_dataset --clickhouse-dsn "${CH_DB}" --signals-path "$SIGNALS_CSV" --symbols-file "$TOKENS_FILE" --fixed-universe-file "$TOKENS_FILE" --run-dir "$RUN_ROOT" --output "$RUN_ROOT/regime_dataset.parquet" --top-n-universe 55 --tp-pct 4.5 --sl-pct 10.0 --max-horizon-bars 200 --trade-replay-source "1s" --target-col "target_pause_value_next_12h" --target-profile "pause_value_12h_v3_clean_extremes" --target-min-resolved 2 --target-sl-rate-threshold 0.60 --feature-profile "regime_compact_v4" && python -u -m pump_end_threshold.cli.train_regime_guard --run-dir "$RUN_ROOT" --dataset-parquet "$RUN_ROOT/regime_dataset.parquet" --target-col "target_pause_value_next_12h" --train-end "$TRAIN_END" --time-budget-min 60 --fold-days 21 --min-train-days 120 --embargo-hours 12 --iterations 8000 --early-stopping-rounds 250 --seed 42 --score-mode "block_value" --model-selection-mode "downstream_cv" --feature-profile "local_only" --max-blocked-share 0.18 --min-signal-keep-rate 0.80 --min-valid-folds 4 --policy-grid "selective_local" --cv-calibration-scope "train_fullstream" --inference-calibration-scope "train_fullstream" --inference-threshold-mode "reresolve_on_inference_calibration"
